source: github:Layr-Labs/eigenlayer-contracts script/configs/mainnet/mainnet-addresses.config.json (proxy addrs) + README deployments table (current release v1.12.0) + live EIP-1967 impl-slot reads (impl ABI source of truth, post-ELIP-002 slashing/redelegation)
note: I0 contract-inventory ground truth for EigenLayer restaking core on mainnet (chain 1). Proxy addresses are stable across releases and come from the official Layr-Labs deploy config; the README deployments table confirms current mainnet release = v1.12.0 (post ELIP-002 slashing/redelegation + ELIP-003). The config JSON in script/configs/ is a v1.4.1 snapshot whose IMPL addresses are stale — every impl address below was re-resolved live via EIP-1967 slot 0x360894...382bbc (eth_getStorageAt) and is the v1.12.0 impl ABI source. Each COVER contract records BOTH the user-called proxy address AND the impl address the verified ABI was fetched from. cover = user (staker/operator) pre-sign surface; exclude = implementation-behind-proxy / governance multisig / oracle / infra / standard-token / legacy. Honest floor: as complete as the official Layr-Labs config + README table; cross-checked against on-chain impl slots. EigenPod is a per-user UpgradeableBeacon proxy (createPod deploys one per staker) — single shared impl ABI, address is per-user so coverage uses the beacon-impl ABI without a fixed user address.

contracts.name: DelegationManager (proxy)
contracts.reason: user delegation + withdrawal surface: delegateTo / redelegate / undelegate / queueWithdrawals / completeQueuedWithdrawal(s) / registerAsOperator / modifyOperatorDetails / updateOperatorMetadataURI. Holds the staker->operator delegation + DelegationApproval EIP-712 grant. Dambi's core permission-delegation target.

contracts.name: StrategyManager (proxy)
contracts.reason: user LST deposit surface: depositIntoStrategy / depositIntoStrategyWithSignature (Deposit EIP-712). Entry point for restaking liquid-staking-token shares.

contracts.name: EigenPodManager (proxy)
contracts.reason: DEFERRED to native-pod round — native beacon-chain restaking (createPod / stake 32ETH validator deposit). Pairs with per-user EigenPod (no singleton manifest target) + SSZ checkpoint proofs. Out of round-1 LST-deposit + delegation scope.

contracts.name: EigenPodBeacon (UpgradeableBeacon for per-user EigenPod)
contracts.reason: DEFERRED to native-pod round — per-user beacon proxy (createPod deploys one per staker), NO singleton address → no per-(chain,address) manifest target; verbs need complex SSZ beacon proofs. Out of round-1 scope.

contracts.name: AllocationManager (proxy)
contracts.reason: DEFERRED to operator-AVS round — operator allocation/slashing surface (modifyAllocations / registerForOperatorSets / setAllocationDelay …). Narrower operator-AVS persona, no staker pre-sign. Out of round-1 delegation+permission scope.

contracts.name: PermissionController (proxy)
contracts.reason: NEW post-ELIP-002 contract. PERMISSION-DELEGATION primitive contract: setAppointee / addPendingAdmin / acceptAdmin / removeAdmin / removeAppointee. Grants third parties scoped (selector-level) call rights over an account's EigenLayer actions. Dambi's raison d'etre — always cover.

contracts.name: AVSDirectory (proxy)
contracts.reason: DEFERRED to operator-AVS round — legacy M2 operator↔AVS registration (registerOperatorToAVS + OperatorAVSRegistration EIP-712), superseded by AllocationManager operator-sets. Operator-AVS persona. Out of round-1 scope.

contracts.name: RewardsCoordinator (proxy)
contracts.reason: user/operator permission + claim surface: setClaimerFor (delegate who can claim your rewards = permission-grant), setOperatorAVSSplit / setOperatorPISplit / setOperatorSetSplit (operator fee config), processClaim(s). The reward-submission creators are AVS/admin-side (excluded per-fn in coverage).

contracts.name: StrategyBaseTVLLimits (LST strategy, 12 deployed: stETH/rETH/cbETH/ETHx/ankrETH/oETH/osETH/swETH/wBETH/sfrxETH/lsETH/mETH)
contracts.reason: infra: users deposit via StrategyManager.depositIntoStrategy (covered), NOT by calling the strategy directly. Strategy.deposit/withdraw are onlyStrategyManager; setTVLLimits is governance. No user pre-sign entry point. (Strategy addresses still enumerated in tokens/ for share<->underlying enrichment.)

contracts.name: EigenStrategy (EIGEN token strategy)
contracts.reason: infra: EIGEN-specific strategy; same as StrategyBaseTVLLimits — deposits routed through StrategyManager, direct calls are onlyStrategyManager/governance.

contracts.name: StrategyFactory (proxy)
contracts.reason: infra/governance: permissionless/owner strategy deployment (deployNewStrategy / whitelist mgmt). Not a staker/operator pre-sign fund-move or permission grant.

contracts.name: Slasher (proxy)
contracts.reason: infra/keeper: AVS/protocol slashing executor (post-ELIP-002 slashing is initiated via AllocationManager.slashOperator by AVS). Not a user pre-sign surface.

contracts.name: AVSDirectory impl
contracts.reason: implementation behind the AVSDirectory proxy — users call the proxy (covered).

contracts.name: DelayedWithdrawalRouter (proxy, deprecated)
contracts.reason: legacy/deprecated: M1 delayed-withdrawal router for native ETH; superseded by EigenPod checkpoint proofs in M2+. Retained on-chain but not the current user pre-sign withdrawal path.

contracts.name: EIGEN token (proxy, ERC-20)
contracts.reason: standard ERC-20 (+EIP-2612 permit) wrapper token — analyzed by the tokens:erc20 standard adapter auto-enumerate, not an EigenLayer-specific surface. EIGEN-specific wrap/unwrap (bEIGEN) is governance/token-mechanics, not restaking pre-sign.

contracts.name: bEIGEN token (proxy, ERC-20)
contracts.reason: standard ERC-20 backing token for EIGEN — tokens:erc20 standard adapter. Not restaking surface.

contracts.name: BeaconChainOracle (EIP-4788 beacon roots / Beacon Oracle)
contracts.reason: oracle: beacon-chain block-root provider for EigenPod proofs. Read-only/keeper, not user pre-sign.

contracts.name: eigenLayerProxyAdmin
contracts.reason: governance: ProxyAdmin (upgrade authority). Owner-only.

contracts.name: eigenLayerPauserReg
contracts.reason: governance/infra: pauser registry. Multisig-only.

contracts.name: Timelock
contracts.reason: governance: upgrade/ops timelock. Not user pre-sign.

contracts.name: CommunityMultisig
contracts.reason: governance multisig.

contracts.name: ExecutorMultisig
contracts.reason: governance multisig (executor).

contracts.name: OperationsMultisig
contracts.reason: governance multisig (operations).

contracts.name: PauserMultisig
contracts.reason: governance multisig (pauser).
